scroller_feed: CRITICAL: NEW YORK, USA TARGETED FOR SUPPLY CHAIN BREAK | GLOBAL MARKETS EXPERIENCING FLUCTUATIONS DUE TO TRADE TENSIONS AND GEOPOLITICAL UNCERTAINTIES. ECONOMISTS PREDICT A POTENTIAL SUPPLY CHAIN DISRUPTION IN THE NEXT 48 HOURS, WITH NEW YORK BEING THE PRIMARY HIGH-IMPACT LOCATION.
